MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: appearances: Alan Horwitz for the plaintiff Fillmore Properties LLC; Xiao-Juan Yu, defendant in pro per.

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into agreement for defendant to maintain a probationary tenancy for 1 year with certain noise restrictions. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare settlement stipulation. Terms contained in the signed agreement shall be for premises at 1730 O'Farrell Street, Apt 01.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Maxwell; Clerk:Danial Lemire; Reporter:Patty Van Steenberge (218)
